_note: CTE traversal regression guard — LSDS-669. Established on first passing CI run. To retune after an intentional query-layer change: VITEST_UPDATE_BASELINE=1 pnpm test --reporter=verbose, then commit the updated values.
_graph: 1000 nodes / 5000 edges — deterministic 5-ary spanning tree + cross-links
_tolerance: measured p50/p95 must not exceed baseline * 1.20
